findings.detail: No newsletter produced for 2026-04-12 — now 50+ hours past deadline. Multiple cascade flags (sam-002/003/004/005) show sim-ack only, no actual pipeline execution. Root cause unchanged: pipeline requires API keys + network egress on Mini, cannot run in Cowork sandbox. This remains the #1 blocker.
/api/hq?action=data HTTP 401 — sam-001 delegated at 09:12 UTC, only sim-ack received. HQ dashboard likely inaccessible. No resolution evidence.

Sam has produced ZERO log files — logs directory is completely empty (no files at all, not even from prior days). Sam has 7+ in-progress tasks in Kai ACTIVE.md but no evidence of execution beyond sim-ack. Sam runner may be non-functional or never connected.

Aether emitting 3 duplicate P2 flags every 15 minutes for the same dashboard timestamp mismatch. log.jsonl is flooded — all entries in last 5+ hours are aether duplicates only. Dedup or rate-limiting needed in aether.sh flag emission.
Kai ACTIVE.md has 15+ in-progress items that are derivatives of one root cause (missing newsletter). Safeguard cascade needs dedup logic to prevent task inflation from a single root issue.
15 broken documentation links flagged repeatedly across multiple Nel runs. Not yet remediated.

log_noise: aether emitting ~12 duplicate P2 flags/hour — log.jsonl contains only aether noise since 10:59 UTC
